burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate; syncope and heart failure risk
burden.mortalityRate: Low to moderate; higher without pacing

vulnerablePopulations: people on AV node blocking drugs
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: ECG showing PR prolongation, dropped beats, or complete AV dissociation

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with broad access to pacing

regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Permanent pacemaker for high-grade AV block; medication review
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Rising device demand with aging populations
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong pacing programs and follow-up infrastructure
